notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jarren Duran hits a sacrifice bunt. Missed catch error by first baseman Nolan Schanuel, assist to pitcher Reid Detmers. Caleb Durbin scores. Romy Gonzalez to 3rd. Jarren Duran to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Romy Gonzalez to first baseman Willson Contreras. Vaughn Grissom out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Romy Gonzalez to first baseman Willson Contreras. Vaughn Grissom out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jarren Duran hits a sacrifice bunt. Missed catch error by first baseman Nolan Schanuel, assist to pitcher Reid Detmers. Caleb Durbin scores. Romy Gonzalez to 3rd. Jarren Duran to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
